pitch: Helps regulated teams launch local AI stacks with residency, governance, and audit controls in weeks.
problem: Enterprises and public-sector teams struggle to deploy AI when data residency, policy, and audit rules vary by region.

targetUser.primary: Enterprises and public-sector IT teams in regulated markets

solution: Prebuilt sovereign deployment blueprints with policy-as-code, regional model routing, audit logs, and compliance workflows.

whyNow.point: AI expansion is becoming a regional sovereignty play.
signalRefs: AI expansion is becoming a regional sovereignty play

whyNow.point: Policy-backed startup and infrastructure incentives create demand for local launch rails.
signalRefs: AI expansion is becoming a regional sovereignty play

differentiator: Prebuilt compliance packs and regional integrations, not generic cloud management.

conceptDiagram.title: Sovereign AI launch path
conceptDiagram.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Policy --> Blueprint --> Deployment
  Deployment --> Audit
  Audit --> Policy

jobsToBeDone.job: Launch AI in a local region fast

signalStrength.rationale: Strong policy and consolidation tailwinds across markets.

painIntensity.rationale: Compliance delays block revenue and procurement approval.

wedgeClarity.rationale: Tight wedge on launch readiness and governance.

defensibility.rationale: Regional templates and integrations compound over time.

ventureScale.rationale: Large enterprise market with expansion across geographies.

topRisks.name: Services drag
topRisks.description: Deployments can become custom consulting work.
topRisks.mitigation: Productize the most common compliance blueprints.

topRisks.name: Regulatory churn
topRisks.description: Rules change by country and over time.
topRisks.mitigation: Use a modular policy layer and partner updates.
